summary: Implemented live Overview sync in CreateProfile: (1) Added _scheduleSync() — debounced (50ms) function that reads all tab getValues() and updates Overview DOM; (2) Every cascade trigger (_cascadeOsChange, _cascadeVendorChange) now calls _scheduleSync() after updating controls; (3) HardwareTab: added _onResChange callback, resSelect now calls onChange; (4) NotesTab: exposed _textArea control and fixed getValues() to return actual textarea value; (5) Removed duplicate setValue calls in seed flow that caused infinite loops; (6) _cascadeOsChange now seeds OS-dependent controls AND calls _scheduleSync() at the end; (7) Added screenPreset to HardwareTab.getValues() so overview shows resolution name for random/real modes. Overview now updates live as user changes any control.
current_status: CreateProfile Overview syncs live with all tab controls. OS change cascades hardware/language/fonts/WebGL + triggers sync. Hardware vendor change cascades renderer + triggers sync. All 6 tabs' getValues() wired correctly. Build 0 errors.
